helpful: mcp_courtlistener_search was helpful to confirm the existence of similar cases in other circuits.
grep and head were essential for targeted reading of large provisioned text files (petition.txt and brief-in-opposition.txt).
gaps: A direct tool to parse or query PDF/text filings semantically would reduce the reliance on grep.
notes: Attempted to use fedcourts query but syntax errors prevented successful execution. Fell back to MCP search.
